title: BlockchAIn Announces Closing of $55 Million Public Offering of Common Stock
description: NEW YORK, June 09, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- BlockchAIn Digital Infrastructure, Inc. (NYSE American: AIB) ('BlockchAIn' or the 'Company'), a developer and operator of digital infrastructure focused on artificial intelligence ('AI') workloads, announces the closing of its previously announced underwritten public offering of 33,333,334 shares of its common stock at a public offering price of $1.65 per share, for total gross proceeds of approximately $55 million, before deducting underwriting discounts and commissions and other offering expenses. The Company intends to use the net proceeds from the offering for working capital, capital expenditures relating to growing its business, and general corporate purposes.

title: Super Micro Plans to Raise $7 Billion in Equity for AI Equipment
description: Super Micro Computer Inc. plans to raise $7 billion through a package of equity offerings to purchase the components needed to fulfill customers’ orders for the company’s artificial intelligence servers.

title: AI Companies Fuel Manhattan Office Boom as Leasing Hits 25-Year High
description: According to new industry data, artificial intelligence companies are fueling a surge in Manhattan office leasing that has put New York City's office market on track for its strongest year in a quarter-century.
content:
Artificial intelligence companies are fueling a surge in Manhattan office leasing that has put New York City's office market on track for its strongest year in a quarter-century, according to new industry data.

title: Commentary: When is it wrong to use AI?
description: The reactions to Pope Leo XIV's manifesto on artificial intelligence were varied, including criticisms from AI skeptics who believe the pope did not go far enough.

title: More swings for AI stocks drag Wall Street back on the roller coaster
description: NEW YORK (AP) — Another sudden reversal for high-flying artificial-intelligence stocks sent Wall Street reeling on Tuesday. The S&P 500 fell 0.3%
content:
NEW YORK (AP) — Another sudden reversal for high-flying artificial-intelligence stocks sent Wall Street reeling on Tuesday.

title: Melania Trump praises winners of childhood AI competition
description: First lady Melania Trump hosted an awards ceremony Tuesday for the K-12 winners of a national artificial intelligence competition, telling the crowd, "You are our future."
content:
